description:
Modern, lightweight and multi-cluster Kubernetes GUI.

Modern, lightweight and multi-cluster Kubernetes GUI. Available on Windows, macOS and Linux.
Features:
- 💯 Connect to one or more clusters simultaneously
- ⚡️ Aggregated Log Viewer
- ⚖️ Resource Diff
- ✌️ Multi-Namespace Selector
- 💪 Human-friendly resource view
- ✍️ View & modify objects
- 🎉 Zero-config setup
- 😉 NOT another Electron app
- ✅ Works with any Kubernetes cluster: on-prem, GKE, EKS, AKS and others.
- 💻 Available on Windows, macOS and Linux
✨ What's new
- add Tolerations and NodeSelector data to Pod View
- support for multi-column filter. E.g: prod-us keda will look for objects with both prod-us AND keda. This can be useful to filter by context, namespace and name.
- Resource Watcher and Log Streamer will now automatically reconnect after a timeout
🐞 Bugs Fixed
- fix column reordering feature Discord
- fix parsing for "k" suffix quantities #465
- fix bulk uninstall Helm Releases Discord
- fix env and envFrom order on Pod View
